name: Emerging Leaders Awards & Scholarship Gala
tagline: Celebrating excellence, honoring scholarship, and inspiring the next generation of leaders.
overview: The Gala committee plans and executes E100's premier annual event — the Emerging Leaders Awards and Scholarship Gala. Always in May. Always at the Delta Flight Museum. The Gala is the organization's most visible night: scholars are recognized, partners are celebrated, and the mission is on full display. Partnerships raises the money — Gala runs the show.
